title: Marathon Digital Holdings Q4 2024 Earnings Beat Expectations
text: Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) delivered strong Q4 2024 results, significantly outperforming analyst expectations on both earnings and revenue metrics. The company reported quarterly earnings of $1.24 per share, substantially exceeding the consensus estimate of a loss of $0.32 per share. This represents a dramatic turnaround from the prior year's loss of $0.02 per share, delivering an earnings surprise of 487.50%. MARA posted revenues of $214.39 million for the quarter ended December 2024, surpassing consensus estimates by 12.25%. This compared favorably to year-ago revenues of $156.77 million, reflecting year-over-year growth in the company's operations. Despite the positive earnings results, Marathon Digital shares underperformed the broader market significantly, declining approximately 26% since the start of 2025, while the S&P 500 gained 1.3% during the same period. The company currently carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating. Analysts expect the stock to perform in line with market expectations going forward, with the next quarter's consensus EPS estimate at negative $0.10 on projected revenues of $223.65 million.
